    :param graph: Weighted graph as an adjacency dictionary.
    :param start: Starting node.
    :param end: Ending node.
    :return: The shortest path between start and end nodes in given graph.
    """
    if start not in graph or end not in graph:
        return None
    if start == end:
        return [start]
    else:
        path = []
        while end != start:
            path.append(end)
            end = graph[end]
        path.append(start)
        return path
